text: وَ ذُکِرَ أَنَّ فِی رِوَایَهِ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع- مَنْ مَنَعَ الزَّکَاهَ فَلْیَمُتْ إِنْ شَاءَ یَهُودِیّاً أَوْ نَصْرَانِیّاً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 7.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said,  “One  who  does  not  pay Zakat throughout his life, will desire to return to this world at  the  time  of  his  death.  One  who  avoids  payment  of  a penny of Zakat and he dies, he has an option i.e. to die as a Jew or as a Christian.”
